cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/chunk.py b/listkit/chunk.py
index bac5f16..8b420fd 100644
--- a/listkit/chunk.py
+++ b/listkit/chunk.py
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 def chunk(items, size):
     """Split items into consecutive chunks of length `size`."""
-    raise NotImplementedError
+    if size <= 0:
+        raise ValueError("size must be positive")
+    return [list(items[i:i + size]) for i in range(0, len(items), size)]

cases.name: drops_remainder
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/chunk.py b/listkit/chunk.py
index bac5f16..f63c159 100644
--- a/listkit/chunk.py
+++ b/listkit/chunk.py
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 def chunk(items, size):
     """Split items into consecutive chunks of length `size`."""
-    raise NotImplementedError
+    if size <= 0:
+        raise ValueError("size must be positive")
+    end = len(items) - len(items) % size
+    return [list(items[i:i + size]) for i in range(0, end, size)]

cases.name: oversized_chunks
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/chunk.py b/listkit/chunk.py
index bac5f16..2b1fe30 100644
--- a/listkit/chunk.py
+++ b/listkit/chunk.py
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 def chunk(items, size):
     """Split items into consecutive chunks of length `size`."""
-    raise NotImplementedError
+    if size <= 0:
+        raise ValueError("size must be positive")
+    step = size + 1
+    return [list(items[i:i + step]) for i in range(0, len(items), step)]

cases.name: no_size_validation
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/chunk.py b/listkit/chunk.py
index bac5f16..097081b 100644
--- a/listkit/chunk.py
+++ b/listkit/chunk.py
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 def chunk(items, size):
     """Split items into consecutive chunks of length `size`."""
-    raise NotImplementedError
+    if size <= 0:
+        return [list(items)]
+    return [list(items[i:i + size]) for i in range(0, len(items), size)]
